hero.headline: When your restaurant can't wait — *we don't either*
hero.subheadline: Walt and his crew know that timing matters. From main line breaks to water heater failures, we're the ones Macon calls first.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every pipe, every problem
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to full installations, we handle what breaks and what needs building

services.title: Emergency Drain Repairs
services.description: When the kitchen backs up mid-rush or the main line decides to quit, we're already on our way. Fast diagnosis, fair pricing.

services.title: Water Heater Service
services.description: No hot water? We'll get it running or recommend the right replacement. From diagnosis to installation, handled completely.

services.title: Main Water Line Repairs
services.description: Leaks between your house and meter are serious business. We locate, diagnose, and fix them right the first time.

services.title: Kitchen & Bath Installations
services.description: Dishwashers, garbage disposals, refrigerator lines — the connections that make your kitchen work. Installed clean and professional.

about.heading: Walt and his crew — serving Middle Georgia
about.body: We're the plumbers Macon restaurants call when every minute counts. Whether it's an emergency repair or a planned installation, our team works fast, fair, and professional. From drain clogs to water line breaks, we handle what needs fixing.

reviews.name: Laurie T.
reviews.text: Walt and his crew are amazing — quick to respond and always helpful. They understand our restaurant needs prompt service, and they deliver every time.

reviews.name: Veronica
reviews.text: Brian and James were professional and kept me informed throughout the whole job. Dishwasher, water line, disposal — everything installed perfectly.

reviews.name: Candace B.
reviews.text: Professional, respectful, and fair priced. They fixed our drain perfectly. Definitely referring them to others.

cta.heading: Ready when you need us
cta.body: Don't let plumbing problems slow you down. Call Walt and his crew for fast, professional service that gets it done right.
